title: Tuberculosis (TB): regional and devolved administration reports
body: "Annual regional reports for the recent epidemiology of tuberculosis (TB) for:   Yorkshire and Humber East of England East Midlands London North East North West South East South West West Midlands   Annual regional reports from previous years are available online:   2017, 2018 and 2019 reports 2016 reports reports from 2015 and earlier   Tuberculosis annual report data for Wales is available from the Public Health Wales website.  "
